commit_scope: feat(field): add living attribution flow adjustments

local_validation.details: Added append-only field view flow adjustments. Focused test creates an lc-network -> Spellmonger view, records a viewer-gratitude adjustment from viewer-session to creator:Terry Mancour, verifies effective flows, receipt readback, contribution ledger rows, policy endpoint, and circulation sensing.

ci_validation.details: Local field-story trace tests passed; CI will rerun the same API surface after PR.

deploy_validation.details: Runtime API change is ready for normal PR/deploy flow; public API calls will be verified after merge.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Public field-story attribution can now stay alive after the immutable receipt by appending sovereign adjustment attestations that conserve CC circulation through paired ledger rows.
test_flows: POST lc-network -> Spellmonger view attribution with cc_amount=1.0
GET living policy and confirm append-only conservation model
POST adjustment moving 0.05 CC from viewer-session to creator:Terry Mancour
GET receipt and confirm adjustment appears with effective flows
GET creator:Terry Mancour ledger and confirm positive field_view_flow_adjustment row
GET circulation summary and confirm living_adjustment=active
